input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8857 [Automation] java run fails for org.neo4j.driver:neo4j-java-driver:5.28.8; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Full driver query/session coverage normally requires a Neo4j server over Bolt, but that is not necessary for the current java-run failure area and should not be introduced unless the generated tests intentionally exercise live database I/O.
The artifact includes native-image properties for Netty system properties, but these are packaged with the library and do not require test-code setup for JVM javaTest.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The resolved Neo4j Java Driver artifact has all required runtime dependencies transitively, and the existing failing coverage targets offline value/object-mapping APIs rather than functionality that requires a live Neo4j server.
